tools.name: lookup_ip
tools.description: Look up geolocation, ISP, and network details for an IP address. Use when you need to determine the physical location, internet provider, or AS number for a given IP.

tools.name: lookup_dns
tools.description: Query DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME, NS) for a domain. Use when you need to check DNS configuration or troubleshoot domain resolution.

tools.name: lookup_whois
tools.description: Get WHOIS registration data for a domain. Use when you need to find domain ownership, registrar, or expiration date.

tools.name: lookup_ssl
tools.description: Check SSL certificate details and expiry for a domain. Use when verifying HTTPS configuration or checking certificate validity.

tools.name: lookup_email
tools.description: Validate an email address (syntax, MX record, disposable check). Use when you need to verify if an email address is real and deliverable.

tools.name: lookup_headers
tools.description: Fetch HTTP response headers for a URL. Use when inspecting server configuration, security headers, or caching policies.

tools.name: lookup_url_metadata
tools.description: Extract title, description, OG tags, and favicon from a URL. Use when you need to preview or summarize a webpage.

tools.name: lookup_domain_availability
tools.description: Check if a domain name is available for registration. Use when brainstorming project names or validating domain ideas. Returns availability status and WHOIS data if registered.

tools.name: lookup_tech_detect
tools.description: Detect technologies used by a website (frameworks, CMS, analytics). Use when analyzing a competitor's tech stack.

tools.name: lookup_vpn_detect
tools.description: Check if an IP address is a VPN, proxy, or Tor exit node. Use when assessing connection trustworthiness or flagging suspicious traffic. Returns detection type and provider details.

tools.name: lookup_phone
tools.description: Parse and validate a phone number, returning country, carrier, line type, and E.164 format. Use when normalizing user-submitted phone numbers or verifying contact data.

tools.name: lookup_company
tools.description: Look up company information by domain name. Returns name, industry, employee count, location, and social profiles. Use when enriching leads or researching organizations.

tools.name: text_base64_encode
tools.description: Encode a UTF-8 string to Base64. Use for embedding data in URLs or APIs that require Base64.

tools.name: text_base64_decode
tools.description: Decode a Base64 string back to UTF-8 text. Use when extracting data from Base64-encoded API responses, tokens, or email headers. Returns the original plaintext string.

tools.name: text_json_format
tools.description: Format and pretty-print a JSON string with configurable indentation. Use when making minified or compact JSON readable for debugging or documentation.

tools.name: text_json_validate
tools.description: Validate whether a string is valid JSON and report parsing errors.

tools.name: text_markdown_to_html
tools.description: Convert Markdown text to HTML. Use when rendering Markdown content for web display or email templates. Returns sanitized HTML.

tools.name: text_html_to_markdown
tools.description: Convert HTML to clean Markdown. Use when extracting readable content from web pages or migrating HTML docs to Markdown format.

tools.name: text_csv_to_json
tools.description: Parse CSV text into a JSON array of objects. Use when converting spreadsheet or tabular data into structured JSON for processing or storage.

tools.name: text_yaml_to_json
tools.description: Convert YAML configuration or data to JSON. Use when parsing YAML config files for programmatic access or API consumption. Returns a JSON object.

tools.name: text_json_to_yaml
tools.description: Convert JSON data to YAML format. Use when generating human-readable config files from JSON data structures.

tools.name: text_xml_to_json
tools.description: Convert XML documents to JSON. Use when parsing XML API responses, feeds, or config files into a structured JSON format for easier processing.

tools.name: dev_hash
tools.description: Generate a hash (MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512) of input text. Use for checksums, data integrity, or fingerprinting.

tools.name: dev_uuid
tools.description: Generate one or more UUIDs (v4 or v7). Use when you need unique identifiers for database records, request tracing, or idempotency keys.

tools.name: dev_jwt_sign
tools.description: Create and sign a JWT with a given payload and secret.

tools.name: dev_jwt_verify
tools.description: Verify and decode a JWT. Use when debugging authentication tokens.

tools.name: dev_cron_describe
tools.description: Convert a cron expression to a human-readable description.

tools.name: dev_password_generate
tools.description: Generate a random password with configurable length and complexity.

tools.name: dev_url_encode
tools.description: URL-encode a string by escaping special characters. Use when building query parameters, form data, or safe URLs that contain reserved characters.

tools.name: dev_url_decode
tools.description: URL-decode a percent-encoded string back to readable text. Use when parsing query parameters, redirect URIs, or encoded form values.

tools.name: dev_regex_test
tools.description: Test a regex pattern against a string and return matches.

tools.name: dev_diff
tools.description: Compute a unified diff between two text strings. Use when comparing file versions, config changes, or code revisions. Returns added, removed, and unchanged lines.

tools.name: dev_semver_parse
tools.description: Parse and validate a semver string into major, minor, patch, pre-release, and build components. Use when checking version compatibility or sorting releases.

tools.name: dev_timestamp_convert
tools.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and ISO 8601 dates. Use when normalizing date formats across APIs, logs, or databases. Returns both Unix and ISO representations.

tools.name: security_encrypt
tools.description: Encrypt text using AES-256-GCM with a passphrase.

tools.name: security_decrypt
tools.description: Decrypt AES-256-GCM encrypted text with a passphrase.

tools.name: security_totp_generate
tools.description: Generate a TOTP secret and provisioning URI for 2FA setup.

tools.name: security_validate_credit_card
tools.description: Validate a credit card number (Luhn check, network detection).

tools.name: security_pii_detect
tools.description: Detect personally identifiable information (emails, phones, SSNs) in text.

tools.name: transform_minify_js
tools.description: Minify JavaScript code by removing whitespace, comments, and shortening variable names. Use when optimizing bundle size for production deployment.

tools.name: transform_minify_css
tools.description: Minify CSS stylesheets by removing whitespace, comments, and redundant rules. Use when reducing stylesheet size for faster page loads.

tools.name: transform_sql_format
tools.description: Format and beautify SQL queries with proper indentation and keyword casing. Use when cleaning up inline SQL for code reviews, documentation, or debugging.

tools.name: transform_code_format
tools.description: Format source code with language-aware indentation and style rules. Supports JS, TS, Python, Go, Rust, and more. Use when standardizing code style or preparing snippets for documentation.

tools.name: transform_json_to_typescript
tools.description: Generate TypeScript interfaces from a JSON sample. Use when building type-safe API clients or converting API responses into TypeScript types.

tools.name: lookup_address_validate
tools.description: Validate a freeform address and return structured components (street, city, state, postal code, country), GPS coordinates, and confidence score. Use when you need to verify or parse an address.

tools.name: lookup_breach_check
tools.description: Check if a password has appeared in known data breaches using k-Anonymity. Returns breach count. Use when you need to verify password safety.

tools.name: lookup_ssl_cert_expiry
tools.description: Check SSL certificate expiry for a domain. Returns issuer, valid dates, days remaining, and expired/expiring-soon flags. Use when monitoring certificate health.

tools.name: lookup_dns_monitor
tools.description: Check DNS records for a domain and compare against the previous snapshot. Detects record changes over time. Use when monitoring DNS configuration.

tools.name: lookup_accessibility
tools.description: Run 10 basic accessibility checks on a webpage URL. Returns a score, issues list, and summary. Use when you need a quick accessibility audit.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "dev_jwt_sign" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Create and sign a JWT with a given payload and secret.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "dev_password_generate" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Generate a random password with configurable length and complexity.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "security_totp_generate" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Generate a TOTP secret and provisioning URI for 2FA setup.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "lookup_breach_check" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Check if a password has appeared in known data breaches using k-Anonymity. Returns breach count. Use when you need to verify password safety.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: lookup_email, lookup_headers, lookup_accessibility · Private data: lookup_dns, lookup_email, lookup_phone, text_base64_decode, text_yaml_to_json, text_json_to_yaml, text_xml_to_json, dev_uuid, dev_jwt_sign, dev_jwt_verify, dev_password_generate, dev_diff, security_totp_generate, lookup_breach_check, lookup_dns_monitor · Public sink: lookup_email, text_base64_decode, text_markdown_to_html · Destructive: lookup_phone, text_json_format, text_html_to_markdown, text_json_to_yaml, text_xml_to_json, transform_sql_format, transform_code_format, lookup_accessibility.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: lookup_email, lookup_headers, lookup_accessibility · Private data: lookup_dns, lookup_email, lookup_phone, text_base64_decode, text_yaml_to_json, text_json_to_yaml, text_xml_to_json, dev_uuid, dev_jwt_sign, dev_jwt_verify, dev_password_generate, dev_diff, security_totp_generate, lookup_breach_check, lookup_dns_monitor · Public sink: lookup_email, text_base64_decode, text_markdown_to_html · Destructive: lookup_phone, text_json_format, text_html_to_markdown, text_json_to_yaml, text_xml_to_json, transform_sql_format, transform_code_format, lookup_accessibility

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
